RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S Demurrer And Motion To Strike: Motion To Strike for loss of consortium is GRANTED without leave to amend. Demurrer is OFF CALENDAR as moot. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT RICHARD LEVY'S Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint And Request For Monetary Sanctions: Motion To Strike claim for loss of consortium is GRANTED without leave to amend.
